settings.label: Bot token
settings.description: Slack bot token (xoxb-...). Use either this OR a session token + cookie pair.

settings.label: Session token (xoxc)
settings.description: Slack workspace token from a logged-in browser/desktop session. Pair with the session cookie below.

settings.label: Session cookie (xoxd)
settings.description: The 'd' cookie from a logged-in Slack session. Required when using a session token.

settings.label: Session cookie (d-s, optional)
settings.description: Optional 'd-s' companion cookie. Some Slack endpoints (file uploads, certain workflow APIs) require it alongside 'd'.

settings.label: Team ID
settings.description: Optional Slack workspace/team ID for display and validation.

settings.label: Conversation types
settings.description: Comma-separated Slack conversation types to list and search.

settings.label: History page size
settings.description: Maximum messages fetched per conversation request.

settings.label: Slack API base URL
settings.description: Override for tests or Slack-compatible gateways.

actions.label: Validate token
actions.description: Ask the adapter to validate the current connection settings.

actions.label: Connect Slack
actions.description: Create or refresh the Slack connection using these settings.

actions.label: Create Slack app
actions.description: Open Slack's app management page to create or configure a bot token.

actions.label: Import from Slack Desktop
actions.description: Read your existing Slack Desktop session via agent-slack.

actions.label: Import from Chrome
actions.description: Read your existing Slack session from Chrome's cookie store via agent-slack.

actions.label: Import from Firefox
actions.description: Read your existing Slack session from Firefox's cookie store via agent-slack.

actions.label: Import from Brave
actions.description: Read your existing Slack session from Brave's cookie store via agent-slack.
